title: nyctago viscosa
intro: Nyctago viscosa, also known as the night-blooming jasmine or wall jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Nyctago viscosa often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and calmness.
